description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a lean build, standing with arms extended horizontally. The individual has visible full-sleeve tattoos on both arms and legs, and is dressed in a short-sleeved t-shirt and shorts. The person wears ankle-high boots and has a distinctive undercut hairstyle with the longer hair swept to one side. The facial features are sharp, and the body posture is upright and balanced. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban style with a focus on body art and alternative fashion.
description: A tattooed adult standing upright in a t-shirt, shorts, and boots, with an undercut hairstyle and arms extended horizontally.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the t-shirt, shorts, boots, and the long section of the hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, undercut hairstyle, and visible tattoos on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Front view displaying facial features, tattoos on both arms and legs, and the front of the clothing and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the undercut hairstyle, profile of the face, and tattoos on the right arm and leg.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long undercut with hair swept to one side
